title: 信息日报 2026-06-25

headline.title: OpenAI 与博通联合发布 LLM 推理优化芯片
headline.summary: OpenAI 与博通推出名为 Jalapeño 的定制 AI 芯片，专为大语言模型推理设计，旨在提升性能、效率与规模化能力。
headline.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
headline.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
headline.original_title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
headline.reason: 这是当天最重大的 AI 硬件新闻，直接影响大模型推理成本与部署，对行业具有深远影响。
headline.reason_en: This is the most significant AI hardware news of the day, directly impacting LLM inference costs and deployment, with far-reaching industry implications.
